title: heleogiton trigonum
intro: Heleogiton trigonum, also known as the Indian gentian, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Heleogiton trigonum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Heleogiton trigonum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
